Battlefield at dawn, ground mist rising through corpses, ravens circling overhead, broken shields half-buried in mud.
Mountain peak piercing storm clouds, lightning crackling below, wind howling around ancient standing stones and ice.
Valhalla's great hall, massive oak beams overhead, roaring hearth-fires casting shadows on carved pillars and shields.
Fjord cliff edge at twilight, longship fleet floating on black water, torches flickering on distant vessels.
Snow-laden forest with towering pines, ancient runestones jutting from drifts, fresh wolf tracks circling the clearing.
Bifrost bridge shimmering with rainbow light, spanning star-filled void between realms, energy crackling along crystalline path.
Divine armory with legendary weapons mounted on golden racks, each blade humming with contained power and runes.
Funeral pyre blazing on sea cliff at sunset, smoke rising orange against crimson sky, waves crashing below.
Mid-flight through endless cloudscape, wind rushing past, horizon curving away in all directions beneath open sky.
Ruined hilltop temple, wind screaming through broken columns, fresh offerings placed on weathered altar stones, ravens watching.
Northern coast where massive waves crash against granite cliffs, spray freezing into ice sculptures on black rock.
Training grounds scarred by divine combat, wooden posts slashed and splintered, earth scorched by lightning and blessed steel.
Glacial valley under aurora borealis, green light dancing across ice fields, distant mountains glowing with otherworldly radiance.
Mead hall interior crowded with feasting warriors, long tables laden with food, battle songs echoing from rafters.
Mountaintop shrine above the tree line, prayer flags snapping in thin air, offerings frozen to stone altar.
Battlefield after nightfall, corpse-fires burning, valkyries descending on pale horses through drifting smoke and ash.
Yggdrasil's lower branches, massive roots visible below, worlds hanging like fruit in infinite cosmic darkness beyond.
Frozen waterfall cascading down cliff face, ice formations glittering, cave entrance behind the curtain of icicles.
Sky above burning village, smoke columns rising, circling valkyries selecting the bravest fallen for Odin's hall.
Volcanic hot springs steaming in snow, black rock pools surrounded by ice, ravens bathing in the mineral water.
Throne room of Asgard with golden pillars reaching toward impossible heights, Odin's seat overlooking all Nine Realms.
Shoreline where waves meet black sand, longship being pulled onto beach, warriors unloading under grey stormy sky.
Eagle's nest perspective from impossible height, entire kingdoms visible below, clouds passing far beneath outstretched wings.
Ancient battlefield preserved in ice, frozen warriors visible beneath crystalline surface, weapons trapped mid-swing for eternity.
Storm-lashed ocean mid-tempest, valkyrie hovering above churning waves, guiding lost ships through supernatural gale toward safe harbor.
